title: Spec-Driven Development
description: Plan, execute, and verify multi-step work through versioned specs with small, testable tasks. Trigger: planning or executing feature work, bug fixes, and multi-phase implementation.

skillMetadata.author: skilly-hand
skillMetadata.changelog: Added a portable SDD lifecycle with capability-based routing, task evidence, change control, and archive invariants; prevents fixed tool dependencies and duplicated task state; affects planning, apply, verify, orchestrate, and spec templates
skillMetadata.auto-invoke: Planning or executing feature work, bug fixes, and multi-phase implementation
